description_long: This is a tall, narrow wooden stand with a square top surface and a matching square base shelf near the bottom. The four legs are slender and taper slightly as they descend, connecting the top and bottom surfaces. Decorative cutouts, including a heart-shaped motif, are present on the upper apron beneath the tabletop, adding a touch of charm. The wood appears dark-stained with visible grain and some subtle inlaid patterns on the top and bottom surfaces. The open design between the legs makes the structure airy and lightweight, suitable for displaying plants, small sculptures, or other decorative items in an urban environment.
description: A tall, narrow wooden stand with a square top, decorative cutouts, and a lower shelf, finished in dark-stained wood.
description_view_0: Front view showing the heart-shaped cutout and the full height of the stand with both top and bottom surfaces visible.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view, still highlighting the heart cutout and the open space between the legs.
description_view_2: Another angled view, showing the heart cutout from a different perspective and the alignment of the legs.
description_view_3: Back view, where the heart cutout is less prominent and the structure of the legs and lower shelf is clearly visible.
